name: Homemade"everything in It" Granola
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 250 degrees F.
Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, stirring until thoroughly combined with your hands.
Divide the mixture evenly between two jelly-roll pans.
Toast for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes and turning over to prevent burning.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
Pack into apothecary jars or other airtight containers.
Keeps indefinitely or about 8 weeks. Makes approximately 16 cups.
